keypress("O", x, bpm)
rest(0.152, bpm)
keypress("a", x, bpm)
rest(0.15, bpm)
keypress("f", x, bpm)
rest(0.15, bpm)
keypress("H", x, bpm)
rest(0.152, bpm)
keypress("k", x, bpm)
rest(0.152, bpm)
keypress("x", x, bpm)
rest(1.096, bpm)
keypress("6", x, bpm)

finishedSong()
